def positive_datetime_boundary_mixes_naive_and_aware_values():
    rule_id = "datetime_boundary_mixes_naive_and_aware_values"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag APIs that accept or combine timezone-aware and timezone-naive datetimes without normalization."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
